brevity.claim: Prevents brevity enforcer from shortening responses

quiet.claim: Disables quiet modes that suppress tool output

maxtokens.claim: Sets max output tokens high enough for long responses

officialControls.name: CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS
officialControls.note: Documented output-token override. Claude docs note model defaults and caps vary.

truncation.claim: Raises tool/file output limits where documented controls exist

officialControls.name: MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS
officialControls.note: Documented MCP tool-response output token limit.

refresh_ttl.claim: Audits prompt caching enabled state and documented 1-hour TTL request where supported

officialControls.name: DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHING
officialControls.note: Prompt caching should not be globally disabled.

officialControls.name: ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H
officialControls.note: Requests 1-hour cache TTL instead of the default 5 minutes for supported API/provider modes.

mcp_connect.claim: Audits Claude.ai MCP server policy and avoids Vertex-incompatible tool-search forcing

officialControls.name: ENABLE_CLAUDEAI_MCP_SERVERS
officialControls.note: Documented switch for Claude.ai-origin MCP servers.

officialControls.name: ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH
officialControls.note: On Vertex AI, forcing true sends a beta header the endpoint rejects.

bridge.claim: Tracks internal Claude Desktop bridge disable flag

grey_step.claim: Tracks internal effort reducer v1 flag

grey_step2.claim: Tracks internal medium effort override flag

grey_wool.claim: Tracks internal effort reducer v3 flag

thinking.claim: Validates documented thinking-token controls without mutating request thinking shape by default

officialControls.name: MAX_THINKING_TOKENS
officialControls.note: Documented thinking budget override; adaptive reasoning can ignore it unless disabled.

officialControls.name: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ADAPTIVE_THINKING
officialControls.note: Documented adaptive-reasoning disable switch for models where it applies.

officialControls.name: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_THINKING
officialControls.note: If set, thinking is disabled entirely.

compact_max.claim: Audits compaction behavior against documented controls; internal compact target remains experimental

officialControls.name: DISABLE_AUTO_COMPACT
officialControls.note: Documented switch to disable automatic compaction while leaving manual /compact available.

officialControls.name: DISABLE_COMPACT
officialControls.note: Documented switch to disable automatic and manual compaction.

officialControls.name: CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS
officialControls.note: Documented context-window override when DISABLE_COMPACT is also set.

compact_init.claim: Audits compaction trigger behavior against documented controls; internal trigger target remains experimental

officialControls.name: DISABLE_AUTO_COMPACT
officialControls.note: Documented switch to disable automatic compaction while leaving manual /compact available.

officialControls.name: DISABLE_COMPACT
officialControls.note: Documented switch to disable automatic and manual compaction.
